mapper.insert: insert into bi_id_mapping (table_name, offline_uuid, server_id, sync_uuid, create_time) values (#{entityType}, #{offlineUuid}, #{serverId}, #{syncUuid}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select table_name as entityType, offline_uuid as offlineUuid, server_id as serverId, sync_uuid as syncUuid, create_time as createTime from bi_id_mapping where table_name = #{entityType} and offline_uuid = #{offlineUuid} limit 1
